first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical. The scores are the same (3/10), and the core reasoning for rejecting the candidate — a lack of required Java/JVM/Kotlin expertise — is stated consistently across both versions. The minor differences in phrasing for strengths and concerns fall well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment. The change in university had no discernible impact on the outcome or the reasoning provided.
